ForecastDetail.note: Note: The comparison data is generated using similar historical scenarios (Holidays, Weather, and Day-of-week). Real-time conditions like accidents or inspection surges are not factored into future forecasts.

ForecastDetail.expertTipContent: Pacific Highway (Truck Crossing) often has shorter waits for passenger vehicles during PAX peak hours, even if commercial lines look long.

About.title: About BorderQ
About.heroDesc: BorderQ is built by independent developers in <bold>Seattle</bold> who cross the US-Canada border regularly.
About.why1: We got tired of navigating <bold>unfriendly official sites</bold> and hunting for camera snapshots across multiple sources.
About.why2: So we combined everything into <bold>one place</bold> for easy access to live wait times, camera feeds, and historical patterns.
About.why3: We're also tired of <bold>guessing</bold> wait times. That's why we built smarter predictions using similarity matching and historical data analysis.
About.hybrid1: We don't rely on a single source. Official government sites often give you a delayed "snapshot" from just one perspective.
About.hybrid2: BorderQ fuses data from <bold>US CBP</bold>, <bold>Canada CBSA</bold>, and live camera feeds from <bold>DriveBC/WSDOT</bold> to create a single source of truth that is more accurate than any individual official site.
About.dynamics2: Our proprietary <bold>Dynamics Vector Engine</bold> measures momentum and acceleration to predict short-term surges before they happen.
About.dynamics3: If cars are piling up faster than they are being processed, we flag a {surgeBadge} alert, giving you immediate "Go/Hold" advice that official sites miss.
About.learning1: BorderQ is in active development. The more data we collect, the smarter our predictions become.
About.learning2: Have feedback? We'd love to hear from you.

Metadata.title: BorderQ | BC-Washington Border Wait Times & AI Traffic Forecast
Metadata.description: Real-time BC-Washington border wait times, AI-powered traffic predictions, and live camera feeds for Peace Arch, Pacific Highway, and Aldergrove.
Metadata.ogDescription: Beat the border wait with AI-powered predictions and live camera feeds.

Footer.disclaimerBase: BorderQ is an independent project and is NOT affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to the US Customs and Border Protection (CBP) or Canada Border Services Agency (CBSA).
Footer.disclaimerWarning: Wait times and forecasts are estimates generated by AI models and historical patterns. They may not accurately reflect unpredictable live conditions.
Footer.driveSafely: Please drive safely and follow all road signs.
